testcase.name: SC-01-T03 · P03 AI 4 步流水线 SSE 推送 + fallback + cancel › a11y: pipeline has aria-live=polite, active step has aria-busy
testcase.failure:

Locator: locator('[data-testid="p03-root"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
